name: HSBC Taj Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under HSBC Taj Credit Card terms
additionalBenefits: Unlimited room upgrades to the next level at participating IHCL hotels
25% savings on best available rate at Taj and other participating IHCL hotels
Four vouchers for set meals for two at participating restaurants
25% savings on food and beverages and Qmin deliveries
Up to 4 spa treatment benefits per year
Swimming pool access for 2 up to 12 times per year
The Chambers Lounge access up to 12 times per year for cardholder and guest
Taj Club Lounge access up to 12 times per year
Unlimited global airport lounge access, subject to programme terms
4 domestic and 4 international chauffeur-driven airport transfers per year
12 complimentary golf games and lessons per year
5 reward points per Rs 100 at Taj, SeleQtions, Gateway, Vivanta and ama Stays & Trails
1.5 reward points per Rs 100 on standard purchases
1.5 reward points equal Re 1 in HSBC Taj Credit Card Wallet balance

salaried: Age 25 to 75 years, Indian resident or existing HSBC India bank account for NRI, annual income at least Rs 40 lakh
selfEmployed: Age 25 to 75 years, Indian resident or existing HSBC India bank account for NRI, annual income at least Rs 60 lakh
